sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Write and optimize Dockerfile for backend service with multi-stage builds, minimal image size, and proper health-check endpoints
Coder Agent: Write and optimize Dockerfile for frontend service with multi-stage builds, minimal image size, and proper health-check configuration
DevOps Agent: Provision GKE Autopilot cluster with Network Policy enabled and required add-ons (Secret Manager CSI driver, Cloud NAT, Cloud DNS)
Coder Agent: Update application.yml with GKE-specific externalized properties using Secret Manager references for Kafka bootstrap servers and DB connection URLs
DevOps Agent: Deploy Helm charts from k8s/ directory including backend deployment with autoscaling and frontend ingress with TLS configuration
DevOps Agent: Create Cloud Build pipeline that triggers on main branch, runs unit tests, builds Docker images, and executes deployment scripts
DevOps Agent: Deploy Prometheus operator and Grafana via Helm, import pre-built dashboards and configure data sources to scrape backend and frontend metrics
DevOps Agent: Enable Google Cloud Logging agent on nodes and configure structured JSON logging in Quarkus for centralized logging
Tester Agent: Execute Postman/Newman scripts against deployed REST endpoints to confirm basic functionality of /api/members and /api/attendance/qr
DevOps Agent: Apply Pod Security Policies, bind IAM Service Accounts using Workload Identity, and validate GDPR/CCPA data-handling controls
Tester Agent: Run Kafka connector verification tests and PostgreSQL data integrity checks using test containers
Tester Agent: Use k6 or JMeter to simulate concurrent attendance scans and user logins, asserting response times < 200ms for critical paths
Tester Agent: Perform OWASP ZAP scans on web UI, validate authentication flows, and confirm sensitive fields are not exposed in logs
Tester Agent: Verify Prometheus scrapes metrics from /actuator/metrics and custom Kafka metrics, test Grafana dashboards and alert firing
Reviewer Agent: Conduct pairwise reviews of Dockerfile optimizations, Helm values, and Kubernetes manifests for best-practice compliance
Reviewer Agent: Validate IAM policies, Secret Manager usage, encryption keys, and ensure no hardcoded credentials exist
Reviewer Agent: Verify DEPLOYMENT.md and SECURITY.md are up-to-date, include run-books, and reference correct artifact repositories
Tester Agent: Run automated tools to check for plaintext secrets and ensure GDPR/CCPA adherence throughout the codebase
DevOps Agent: Test simulated failure/recovery using rollback procedures and document scripts/rollback.sh
Reviewer Agent: Approve that all GDPR/CCPA controls are satisfied including data minimization, consent logging, and data retention
Manager Agent: Mark Phase-5 status as Complete in project tracker with formal sign-off from Manager, DevOps, and Security Reviewer
